race.comment: CENTURY SONG (1) unlucky not to get the money first-up over this track and trip and has raced out of his grade at the last two outings. Slow into stride and shuffled back along the inside with a plugging eighth over 1100m at Rosehill in BM78 company. Saves his best for his home track and this trip. The one to beat. VINGT NEUF NOIR (9) consistent sprinting filly who comes here fifth-up on a firmer track. Failed to make it three straight wins when slow into stride before catching the eye when fourth over 1100m at Hawkesbury. Winning rider goes back on and stays in the mix. STILL ALICE (7) excellent return with 59.5 kg to run fourth over 1100m at Hawkesbury in a strong rating contest. Proven second-up and gets map favours. SHALAA GOLD (2) resumes in a weaker contest. Has impressed in his two trials and will push forward and give plenty of cheek with the claim.
